summary: Iteration 133: Staff Performance Dashboard and AI Duty Assignment features tested - Backend 25/25 tests passed (100%), Frontend UI fully verified. Staff Performance page has 3 tabs (Overview, Employee Scores, Duty Assignment), 5 stat cards, tier distribution bar chart, weekly attendance line chart, top performers, employee scores table, AI duty planner with 4 role cards.

issues: React hydration warning - <tr>/<span>/<tbody> nested HTML elements causing hydration warnings (does not affect functionality, console-only)

critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/staff-performance returns employees with reliability_score, tier, attendance_rate, punctuality_rate, overtime_hours, weekly_trends - all fields present and valid
GET /api/staff-performance/{employee_id} returns detailed individual performance with daily breakdown - 404 for nonexistent employee
POST /api/task-reminders/ai-generate validates role is required (400 if missing), uses Emergent LLM GPT-4o for generation
POST /api/task-reminders/bulk creates reminders from preset templates for valid roles (cleaner/waiter/cashier/chef)
GET /api/task-reminders/presets returns preset templates with name, message, interval_hours for all 4 roles
Tier calculation: excellent (>=85), good (>=70), average (>=50), needs_improvement (<50)
Reliability score formula: attendance_rate*0.4 + punctuality_rate*0.3 + (100-absence_rate)*0.2 + task_acks*0.1

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All 3 tabs, stat cards, charts, tables, AI dialog verified)

seed_data_creation: None - used existing data (2 employees: Ahmed Khan, aaaa)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 133: Staff Performance Dashboard fully verified. Test data: 2 active employees - Ahmed Khan (100% attendance, 50% punctuality, 1 late, score ~75 'Good') and aaaa (0% attendance, 0% punctuality, score ~20 'Needs Improvement'). AI Duty Generation uses Emergent LLM (GPT-4o) - do not test actual AI calls. The page has 3 tabs: Overview (5 stat cards, tier bar chart, weekly line chart, top performers), Employee Scores (full table with ScoreRing), Duty Assignment (AI planner banner, 4 role cards with Use Preset and AI Plan buttons). Task reminders bulk endpoint creates 5 preset reminders per role.

response_structure.employees: array with employee_id, name, role, reliability_score, tier, attendance_rate, punctuality_rate, scheduled_shifts, present, late, absent, overtime_hours, task_completions
response_structure.weekly_trends: array with week, attendance_rate, total_shifts, late_count

response_structure.stats: scheduled, present, late, absent, overtime_hours, attendance_rate, punctuality_rate, task_completions
response_structure.daily: array with date, shift, status, actual_in, actual_out, overtime_hours

ai_duty_generation_api.note: Uses Emergent LLM GPT-4o - actual AI call tested via input validation only

elements_verified: Page title: Staff Performance with subtitle
3 tabs: Overview, Employee Scores, Duty Assignment
Overview tab: 5 stat cards (Employees, Avg Attendance, Avg Punctuality, Total Overtime, Shifts Tracked)
Overview tab: Performance Tier Distribution bar chart (recharts)
Overview tab: Weekly Attendance Trend line chart
Overview tab: Top Performers section with ScoreRing, tier badges
Employee Scores tab: Full table with #, Employee, Score, Attendance%, Punctuality%, Shifts, Late, Absent, OT, Tasks, Tier
Duty Assignment tab: AI-Powered Duty Planner banner with Generate button
Duty Assignment tab: 4 role cards (Cleaner, Waiter, Cashier, Chef) with Use Preset and AI Plan buttons
AI Duty Planner dialog: Role selector, Shift Hours input, Additional Context textarea, Generate Duty Plan button
Sidebar: Staff Performance link under PEOPLE section with Award icon
